capabilities.name: P25 Phase 1 FDMA
capabilities.definition: Support Project 25 Phase 1 FDMA common air interface operation.

capabilities.name: P25 Phase 2 TDMA

capabilities.name: Dual-mode FDMA/TDMA

capabilities.name: Conventional operation
capabilities.definition: Support conventional (non-trunked) P25/analog operation.

capabilities.name: Trunked operation
capabilities.definition: Support trunked system control and voice/data services.

capabilities.name: Analog FM interoperability
capabilities.definition: Support analog FM on designated interoperability channels.

capabilities.name: DMR Tier II conventional
capabilities.definition: Support DMR Tier II where specified for campus/utility use.

capabilities.name: DMR Tier III trunked
capabilities.definition: Support DMR Tier III trunking where specified.

capabilities.name: P25 CAP compliance
capabilities.definition: Equipment tested under P25 CAP where required in the RFP.

capabilities.name: TIA-102 standards suite
capabilities.definition: Conform to applicable TIA-102 documents for claimed features.

capabilities.name: Common channel operation
capabilities.definition: Support P25 common/interoperability channel operation.

capabilities.name: Mixed Phase 1/2 fleet
capabilities.definition: Infrastructure supports mixed Phase 1 and Phase 2 subscribers.

capabilities.name: VHF operation

capabilities.name: UHF operation
capabilities.definition: Operate in UHF public-safety band allocations as licensed.

capabilities.name: 700 MHz operation

capabilities.name: 800 MHz operation

capabilities.name: 900 MHz operation

capabilities.name: Multiband subscriber

capabilities.name: Channel capacity planning
capabilities.definition: Provide channel counts meeting stated GoS and growth assumptions.

capabilities.name: FCC interoperability channels
capabilities.definition: Support designated FCC interoperability channels.

capabilities.name: Narrowband compliance
capabilities.definition: Meet applicable narrowband channel spacing requirements.

capabilities.name: Frequency reuse design
capabilities.definition: Support frequency reuse / simulcast planning assumptions in design.

capabilities.name: Centralized core
capabilities.definition: System uses geographically redundant centralized core controllers.

capabilities.name: Distributed core
capabilities.definition: System uses distributed architecture where sites can assume core functions.

capabilities.name: Geo-redundant core
capabilities.definition: Primary and secondary cores at geographically separate locations.

capabilities.name: No single point of failure
capabilities.definition: No single failure of control-plane equipment disables system-wide voice.

capabilities.name: Failsoft / site trunking
capabilities.definition: Graceful degradation to site trunking or conventional failsoft on core loss.

capabilities.name: Site trunking mode
capabilities.definition: Continue local trunked operation when wide-area links fail.

capabilities.name: System-wide group call
capabilities.definition: Support system-wide group call to all SUs in a trunked system.

capabilities.name: Backup and restore
capabilities.definition: Backup/restore of critical system configuration and databases.

capabilities.name: Agency-owned core
capabilities.definition: Agency owns/operates primary and redundant core equipment where required.

capabilities.name: Transparent site roaming
capabilities.definition: Automatic intra-system roaming across sites.

capabilities.name: Fault-tolerant system control
capabilities.definition: Redundant controllers with no SPOF in control network.

capabilities.name: Dynamic regrouping
capabilities.definition: Merge/unmerge talkgroups dynamically for incidents.

capabilities.name: Base station / repeater

capabilities.name: Simulcast comparator
capabilities.definition: Audio/data comparator for simulcast voting.

capabilities.name: Receiver voting

capabilities.name: Multicast / multi-cast sites

capabilities.name: Tower top amplifier

capabilities.name: Antenna system
